title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Theatre Tickets
questions.text: Tickets bought online can be collected from the theatre desk after 6 p.m. Please bring the card used for payment. Tickets will not be posted, even if you bought them several weeks ago.
questions.question: What should online customers do?

options.A: Collect their tickets at the theatre.
options.B: Wait for tickets to arrive by post.
options.C: Pay again at the theatre desk.

questions.explanation: Online tickets are collected at the desk and will not be posted.

questions.heading: Message from Beth to Connor
questions.text: Connor, I spoke to the coach. She says you can join training today, but you’ll have to watch the first game because the team list was finished yesterday. Hope that’s OK.
questions.question: What has Beth found out?

options.A: Connor can practise but not play immediately.
options.B: Connor has been chosen for the first game.
options.C: Training has been moved to yesterday.

questions.explanation: Connor can join training but must watch the first game.

questions.heading: From: Daniel / Subject: Camping trip
questions.text: The campsite allows small fires, but only in the metal cooking areas. We should bring easy food because there isn’t a shop nearby. I’ll take matches if you can bring the pan.
questions.question: What is Daniel doing?

options.A: Planning what they need for cooking.
options.B: Asking where the nearest shop is.
options.C: Saying fires are not allowed there.

questions.explanation: Daniel discusses fires, food, matches and a pan.

questions.heading: Sports Water Bottle
questions.text: This bottle can be washed in warm water, but do not put it in a dishwasher. The coloured design may fade if it becomes too hot. Not suitable for hot drinks.
questions.question: What does the label warn users?

options.A: Heat may damage the bottle’s appearance.
options.B: The bottle cannot be washed at all.
options.C: Cold drinks should not be put inside.

questions.explanation: The coloured design may fade if it becomes too hot.

questions.heading: Student Volunteers Needed
questions.text: We need students to help younger children during reading afternoon. Volunteers will listen to children read and help them choose books. Training is at lunchtime on Thursday and is required.
questions.question: Who can volunteer?

options.A: Students who attend the training session.
options.B: Students who already work in libraries.
options.C: Students who can bring younger children.

questions.explanation: Training on Thursday is required for volunteers.
